outages.boundary: N BEELINE HWY TO N BEELINE HWY AND UNKNOWN TO E HERMOSA VISTA DR
outages.comments: Electrical equipment has failed. SRP crews are working to restore power.

outages.boundary: S 44TH ST TO S HOHOKAM EXPY AND W HOHOKAM EXPY TO E ELWOOD ST
outages.comments: An SRP maintenance crew is performing critical maintenance work to repair or upgrade equipment. Power will be restored as quickly as possible.
